body.title: Eliminate IGOR_HOME env from skill run-scripts (missed by T-uu-eliminate-igor-home-env)
body.description:
T-uu-eliminate-igor-home-env closed PROVEN but had a scope hole: 4 live skill run-scripts (skills/{context-load,note,savestate,sprint-ticket}/run) still read os.environ['IGOR_HOME']. Two compounding causes: (1) the footprint grep was scoped to unseen_university/ devices/ devlab/claudecode/ — skills/ was never grepped; (2) the proof guard grepped '*.py', but these scripts are named 'run' (no extension), so the guard was structurally blind to them. Surfaced when the post-compact file-reads showed skills/context-load/run:17.

Fix: the 4 run-scripts now resolve via uu_home() (env-free); the proof guard (test_no_source_reads_igor_home_env) widened from '*.py' to ALL tracked files (excl tests, *.md, memory store) so extensionless scripts can never slip through again.

**Affected files:** skills/context-load/run, skills/note/run, skills/savestate/run, skills/sprint-ticket/run, tests/test_igor_home_env_eliminated.py
**Design rules:** test-plan (proof guard), one-canonical-env-var (UU_ROOT; uu_home() derived)
**Scope boundary:** IN: the 4 executable run-scripts + widening the guard. OUT: SKILL.md doc-snippets (skills/notify/SKILL.md, skills/sorted/SKILL.md) that reference IGOR_HOME in prose/example snippets — those fall to the literal default and are functionally correct; they belong to the skills content-merge phase (theigors->unseenuniversity axis of D-skills-two-products), which sweeps all skill drift uniformly. Boundary named here, not hidden.
**Test plan:** widened guard test_no_source_reads_igor_home_env asserts zero IGOR_HOME env reads across all tracked live code; red->green proof reverts the run-scripts to their IGOR_HOME-reading state.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Closed the IGOR_HOME scope hole from T-uu-eliminate-igor-home-env: 4 skill run-scripts (context-load/note/savestate/sprint-ticket) now resolve uu_home(); proof guard widened from '*.py' to all tracked files so extensionless scripts can't slip through again. Proof: revert run-scripts -> guard finds IGOR_HOME (red) -> green. SKILL.md doc-snippets (notify, sorted) deferred to skills content-merge phase (boundary named in ticket).
